parents.subject: LU-12999 mgs: Cleanup string handling in name_create_mdt

commit.subject: LU-14705 test: reproducer for the changelog_clear race
commit.message:
LU-14705 test: reproducer for the changelog_clear race

Ugly patch to reproduce a race between 2 changelog_clear threads.

The following assertion should be trigger on the mds:
llog_osd_next_block()) ASSERTION( llog_osd_exist(loghandle) ) failed

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity env=ONLY=160l,ONLY_REPEAT=10
Signed-off-by: Etienne AUJAMES <eaujames@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I2189f8bf2e9236fa8ec44168248fef5236e2de58
